productName: Legacy Truffles - DOH Compliant - Triple Truffle - Mochi Cake - 1g
description: Decadent hybrid moon rocks built from Mochi Cake — a fat nug dipped in cannabis oil and rolled in kief, three layers of potency stacked into one slow-burning powerhouse. Break it up, take it slow — a sweet, vanilla, earthy aroma with a relaxing, euphoric feel, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
